cxu_object.claim: Signal direction predictions are structurally broken at approximately fifty percent accuracy across all signal types making them equivalent to a coin flip for directional trading decisions

supporting_contexts.text: 8,000+ settled predictions analyzed across all signal types. NOTHING above 50% accuracy on direction. Best performer: onchain-flow@1h at 49.9% accuracy. Worst: bb-reversal@1m at 5% accuracy (worse than random).

Root cause identified: Symmetric range derivation. Direction was derived from whether the range center was above or below current price, making it structurally random. Use price action over signals for direction — signals provide range and confidence, not reliable direction.

hierarchy.document_title: AgDel Trading Wiki — One Week Intensive Results

version.change_description: Critical axiom: signals are coin flips for direction, validated across 8,000+ predictions
